settings.title: The Engagement Process
settings.description:
Each and every piece of jewellery we create at Natalie Marie Jewellery is intertwined with a one of a kind love story. Our Engagement Ring Collection unites traditional sentiments with modern sensibilities to offer an elevated and thoughtful curation designed to be worn, treasured and adored from the day you say ‘yes’, to every day that follows.

“Crafting an engagement ring is more than just creating an object, it’s the opportunity to create something that is symbolic and significant – a wearable treasure that acts as tangible expressions of love and sentiment.” – Natalie Fitch

Explore our refreshed Engagement range today, and find the perfect pieces for your forever love.
settings.feature_text: A conduit for a question; a symbol of forever. Our engagement range is an authentic manifestation of your love stories.

settings.title: Engagement
settings.description:
A conduit for a question; a symbol of forever. Our engagement service is anchored in intimacy and personalisation, accessible virtually or in-person at our Avalon-based studio.

  • Online Engagement Collection
  • One of a Kind Collection

settings.title: Bespoke
settings.description:
Location shouldn’t restrict creative expression, and we work with clients situated all over the world to bring their dream engagement ring concepts to life.

Book for:

  • Custom designs
  • Design your own

settings.title: Forever Love
settings.description: Your most personal piece; a symbol of inimitable connection. Discover our collection of unique engagement rings and begin your journey.

settings.title: For a Love That Can't Wait
settings.description: Love in the here and now with our collection of engagement-ready rings; one-off pieces available for immediate shipping. Slowly crafted by our team, and intended for greatness.

settings.title: Client Stories
settings.description: Jewellery is about more than its aesthetic - perhaps it tells of the bond between lovers, celebrates a milestone, honours a treasured relationship or commemorates a moment in time.
